name: Craniofacial Geometry Group
focus: skull, face, mandible, and imaging metrics

name: Fertility Outcomes Group
focus: semen, ovarian reserve, IVF, pregnancy, and reproductive outcomes

name: Neonatal Trajectory Group
focus: birth cohort, NICU, and neonatal morphology metrics

name: Genetics Group
focus: heritability, GWAS, family history, and developmental pathways

name: Statistical Methods Group
focus: causal inference, phylogenetics, allometry, and manifold modeling

name: Software Group
focus: CLI, schemas, packages, CI, dashboards, and APIs

name: Ethics Group
focus: privacy, consent, sensitive human data, and governance
